edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: The released BF16 Super checkpoint is post-trained from the Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base checkpoint; the post-training pipeline begins with the Base model, adds 1M-context/SFT/RL/RLHF/MTP-healing stages, and produces Nemotron 3 Super.

evidence.excerpt: Base 1M Context SFT 7M Samples 80B Tokens RLVR ... SWE RL 20B Tokens RLHF MTP healing 18B Tokens Nemotron 3 Super
evidence.explanation: The pipeline diagram shows Base as the starting checkpoint for the SFT/RL/RLHF/MTP-healing stages that yield Nemotron 3 Super.

evidence.excerpt: NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16 model is a result of the above work.
evidence.explanation: The BF16 model card identifies the released model as the result of the staged training methodology.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16

evidence.excerpt: Nemotron-Super-Post-Training-Data : a collection of RL environments and SFT datasets targeting a broad range of agentic capabilities.

evidence.excerpt: Collection of datasets used in the post-training phase of Nemotron Nano and Super v3.
